ast.name: error
ast.source: forceFrameRate takes a positive int between 0 and 125, forcing frame rates higher than 125 fps is not supported
ast.target: forceFrameRate 接受 0 到 125 之间的正整数，不支持强制设置高于 125 fps 的帧率

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle this option to show the folder hierarchy of files in the backlinks panel, providing more context for each backlink.
ast.target: 切换此选项可在反向链接面板中显示文件的文件夹层级，为每个反向链接提供更多上下文。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable this option to show the folder hierarchy in the tab headers, allowing you to see the file's path in addition to its name.
ast.target: 启用此选项可在标签页标题中显示文件夹层级，让您除了文件名外还能看到文件的路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable this option to display the folder hierarchy below each markdown editor, helping you to quickly see related files in the same directory.
ast.target: 启用此选项可在每个 Markdown 编辑器下方显示文件夹层级，帮助您快速查看同一目录下的相关文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter paths (one per line) that should be excluded from the hierarchy view.
ast.target: 输入应从层级视图中排除的路径（每行一个）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter path prefixes (one per line) to remove from displayed paths in the hierarchy view. For example, 'pages/' will be removed from paths starting with 'pages/'.
ast.target: 输入要从层级视图中显示的路径中移除的路径前缀（每行一个）。例如，'pages/' 将从以 'pages/' 开头的路径中移除。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在反向链接面板中显示层级

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在标签页标题中显示层级

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在编辑器视图中显示层级
